Clothing Manufacturing Costs Explained: 2026 Guide

July 1, 2026 | By FABRIOZA

Understanding clothing manufacturing costs is essential for pricing your products, calculating margins, and choosing the right manufacturing partner. In this 2026 guide, we break down every cost component with real numbers — and show you why Pakistan offers the best value for custom clothing manufacturing.

Cost Components Breakdown

1. Fabric (30-40% of total cost)

Fabric is typically the largest cost component. Prices vary by type, quality, and quantity:

  • Basic cotton (160gsm): $3-5 per meter
  • Premium ringspun cotton (200gsm): $5-8 per meter
  • Polyester performance fabric: $4-7 per meter
  • Organic cotton: $6-10 per meter
  • Bamboo/spandex blend: $7-12 per meter
  • Recycled polyester: $5-9 per meter

2. Labor (20-30% of total cost)

Labor costs vary dramatically by country:

CountryHourly Labor CostAdvantage
Pakistan$0.80-1.50Lowest cost, skilled workforce
China$3-6High automation
Bangladesh$0.60-1.20Lowest cost, limited capabilities
India$1-2Large workforce
Turkey$4-7Proximity to Europe
USA/UK$15-40Domestic production

3. Trims & Notions (5-10%)

Buttons, zippers, labels, thread, elastic, drawstrings. Typically $0.50-2.00 per garment depending on complexity.

4. Decoration (10-20%)

  • Screen printing (1 color): $1-3/unit at 100 pcs
  • Embroidery (left chest logo): $3-6/unit
  • Sublimation (all-over): $4-8/unit
  • 3D puff embroidery: $5-10/unit
  • Woven labels: $0.20-0.50/unit

5. Packaging (2-5%)

Poly bags, hang tags, tissue paper, mailer bags. $0.30-1.50 per garment depending on branding level.

6. Shipping (5-15%)

Varies by destination, method, and order size. Sea freight can be as low as $0.50/unit for large orders.

Real Cost Examples (2026)

Garment50 pcs100 pcs500 pcs1,000 pcs
Basic T-Shirt (180gsm)$8-12$6-9$4-6$3-5
Premium T-Shirt (220gsm)$12-16$9-13$7-10$5-8
Standard Hoodie (320gsm)$18-25$15-20$12-16$10-14
Premium Hoodie (400gsm)$25-35$20-28$16-22$14-18
Leggings (Nylon/Spandex)$14-20$11-16$9-12$7-10
Soccer Jersey (Sublimated)$15-22$12-18$10-14$8-12

Hidden Costs to Watch For

  • Sample fees: $50-200 per sample (we credit ours to bulk orders)
  • Setup fees: Screen charges, embroidery digitization ($30-80)
  • Custom labeling minimums: 500-1,000 labels minimum order
  • Import duties: 0-16% depending on country and trade agreements
  • Customs clearance: $50-150 per shipment
